# polaris_principal_role (Resource)

Manages a Polaris principal role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "polaris_principal_role" "example" {
  name = "data-engineer"

  properties = {
    "team" = "data-engineering"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the principal role. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `properties` (Map of String) Key-value metadata attached to the principal role.

### Read-Only

- `create_timestamp` (Number) Creation time as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
- `entity_version` (Number) Version of the principal role object, used for optimistic concurrency control.
- `last_update_timestamp` (Number) Last update time as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
